candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and preferred candidate; matches total revenue/sales concept.
Not revenue from operations; finance income, so not appropriate.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Financial assets (current) at actual value through income statement
candidates.why: Balance sheet financial asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct revenue line from candidates. 'Net sales' is also present and numerically identical, but candidate list already contains a correct revenue label, so kept final choice to the provided candidate.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line and best match for cost of goods sold/cost of sales.

variables.notes: Best direct-cost line on the income statement.

candidates.why: Classic operating overhead/personnel expense component.
Likely operating overhead bucket; fits SG&A-type external/admin/selling costs.
Additional operating overhead bucket; not a total/subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized expenditure for research and development and similar
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not period SG&A expense.
Equity reserve, not SG&A expense.
Headcount metric, not expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal row is present. Selected the main overhead component rows and excluded COGS, depreciation/impairment, finance items, and totals/subtotals.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization, not current-period R&D expense, and appears in supplemental disclosure below operating results.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized expenditure for research and development and similar
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Equity reserve, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line is visible on the income statement. The only R&D-related line is supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, which should be excluded from XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost total; usable only if granular recurring components are unavailable.
Direct recurring interest expense line; preferred component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component related to lease liabilities; should be included with interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid double counting if main line is selected.
Finance income, not expense.
Balancing row, not an underlying expense component.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components and excluded the broader 'Financial costs' total to avoid double counting. Excluded supplemental duplicate and FX/non-recurring finance rows.

candidates.row_label: attributable to owners of parent company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution line for profit, not balance sheet equity.
Equity subcomponent, not total book equity.
Equity subcomponent, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Best owner/parent-only equity line; excludes non-controlling interests if any.
Total equity line, but less preferred than parent-only equity due to potential inclusion of NCI.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred the parent-shareholders equity line to avoid double counting with MIB. Included 'Total Equity' as fallback priority because labels may vary by year, though values shown are identical here.
No non-controlling interests/minority interest line is present on the balance sheet.
